title: TransferClaimBlocks
description: GriefPrevention addon to add a transfer claim blocks command
body:
A simple addon to GriefPrevention that adds a command to transfer claim blocks from you to another player. Requires: [GriefPrevention](https://www.modrinth.com/plugin/griefprevention) Usage: `/transferclaimblocks `
Permission: `transferclaimblocks.command.transferclaimblocks`
Description: Removes claimblocks from yourself and gives it to the other player.
